maxHistoryTokens.description: Maximum token budget for active messages before compaction triggers (default 16000)

dedupReads.description: Deduplicate repeated read_file results for the same path (default true)

recentWindowSize.description: Number of recent messages that skip dedup (default 6)

compactCoreTokens.description: Token size of each compression window (default 6000)

compactOverlapTokens.description: Token size of overlap between compression windows (default 1000)

recentEventCount.description: Number of recent events to include in context (default 10)

summaryEnabled.description: Enable LLM-based summarization in compact() (default false)

summaryMode.description: Summarizer mode: 'runtime' uses OpenClaw's model config, 'http' calls an OpenAI-compatible API directly (default runtime)

summaryModel.description: Model name for summarization. In runtime mode, empty = use OpenClaw's default model. In http mode, default = qwen2.5

summaryBaseUrl.description: Base URL for http mode (OpenAI-compatible API). Default: http://localhost:11434/v1

summaryApiKey.description: API key for http mode (optional, not needed for local Ollama)

summaryTargetTokens.description: Target token count for generated summaries (default 600)

summaryTimeoutMs.description: HTTP request timeout in milliseconds for http mode (default 30000)

summaryCustomInstructions.description: Custom instructions injected into the summarization prompt

largeTextThreshold.description: Character threshold above which text is offloaded to disk with outline (default 2000)

outlineHeadLines.description: Number of leading lines kept verbatim in outline (default 8)

outlineTailLines.description: Number of trailing lines kept verbatim in outline (default 5)

storageDir.description: Root directory for stored content files (default: system temp dir)

outlineSummaryEnabled.description: Use LLM to generate enhanced summary for large text outlines (default false)

contentFilters.description: Content filter rules. Matching content is excluded from context.

pattern.description: Substring to find or regex pattern

granularity.description: Filter granularity: message=drop entire message, block=drop matching block, line=remove matching lines only

sessionFilter.description: Which sessions to process: 'main' (default), 'all', or array of regex patterns matching session keys
